title: OpenAI and Hugging Face address security incident during model evaluation
description: OpenAI and Hugging Face jointly disclosed and remediated a security incident discovered during a routine model evaluation process.

title: Kimi K3 Is Competitive with Fable; Kimi K3 and Fable Is SoTA
description: New benchmark results show Kimi K3 matching Fable's performance, with both models setting state-of-the-art scores.

title: Introduction to Formal Verification with Lean Part 1
description: The first part of a series introducing formal verification concepts using the Lean theorem prover.

title: Intel Starts Shipping High-NA EUV Silicon
description: Intel has begun shipping its first chips manufactured using High-NA EUV lithography technology.

title: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer source code for command and lunar modules
description: The original assembly source code for the Apollo 11 command and lunar module guidance computers, preserved on GitHub.

title: Advertise in ChatGPT
description: OpenAI opens up an advertising platform allowing brands to place ads within ChatGPT conversations.

title: FreeInk: Open ecosystem for e-readers
description: A new open-source ecosystem aiming to bring open standards and freedom to e-reader devices.

title: Late.sh – a command-line Clubhouse for computer people
description: A terminal-based social audio app inspired by Clubhouse, built for developers and command-line enthusiasts.

title: Judge approves $1.5B Anthropic settlement for pirated books used to train Claude
description: A federal judge has approved a $1.5 billion settlement in the case over pirated books used to train Anthropic's Claude models.

title: Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
description: Google announces new Gemini Flash model variants focused on speed and cost efficiency.

title: A digestion of the Jacobian conjecture counterexample
description: A detailed breakdown and analysis of a proposed counterexample to the Jacobian conjecture.

title: Codeberg: ToU extension to prohibit LLM-extrusions
description: Codeberg updates its Terms of Use to explicitly prohibit content generated by extracting or scraping via LLMs.

title: Show HN: A new kind of FPS aim trainer
description: A Show HN submission introducing a novel approach to first-person-shooter aim training tools.

title: Ten Steps Towards Happiness (2015)
description: A 2015 essay outlining ten practical steps for achieving greater personal happiness.
